properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have a Savior, He’s pleading in glory, A dear, loving Savior, though earth friends be few; And now He is watching in tenderness o’er me, But oh that my Savior were your Savior, too.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For you I am praying, For you I am Praying, For you am I praying, I’m praying for you.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I have a Father; to me He has given A hope for eternity, blessed and true; And soon He will call to meet Him in heaven, But oh that He’d let me bring you with me, too!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I have a robe; ’tis resplendent in whiteness, Awaiting in glory my wondering view; Oh, when I receive it, all shining in brightness, Dear friend, could I see you receiving one, too!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: When Jesus has found you, tell others the story, That my loving Savior is your Savior, too; Then pray that your Savior will bring them to glory, And prayer will be answered-’twas answered for you!
